content.text: It's -- I mean, it's not really a feeling thing, it's just there's a lot. Like Thursday alone has three separate deliverables and my team lead is out, so I'm covering his stuff too, and then my partner's got a work dinner Friday so I'm solo with the kids, and -- I guess stressed? But like, productive stressed? I just need to figure out what to cut. Can you help me figure out what to cut?
